title: tanacetum achilleifolium
intro: Tanacetum achilleifolium, also known as White Tansy or Tansy with Fern-like Leaves, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic agent. The health benefits of Tanacetum achilleifolium include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate menstrual cramps. Tanacetum achilleifolium can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
